title: Perform pit lane and service area operations at motor sport events
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform pit lane and service area operations at motor sport events demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from event information1.2 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Equipment and tooling are positioned to ensure clear movement paths1.5 Work area is cleaned and laid out for job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from event information1.2 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Equipment and tooling are positioned to ensure clear movement paths1.5 Work area is cleaned and laid out for job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from event information1.2 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Equipment and tooling are positioned to ensure clear movement paths1.5 Work area is cleaned and laid out for job requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Follow pit lane and service area safety procedures

pcs.text: Jacks and other lifting devices, including lifting lock-outs, are fitted prior to underbody servicing2.2 Fire hazard and prevention procedures are followed according to team procedures or event category rules and supplementary regulations2.3 Pit lane and service area signals are used according to team procedures, and event category rules and supplementary regulations2.4 Access to pit lane or service area and walkways by non-team members is monitored according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Jacks and other lifting devices, including lifting lock-outs, are fitted prior to underbody servicing2.2 Fire hazard and prevention procedures are followed according to team procedures or event category rules and supplementary regulations2.3 Pit lane and service area signals are used according to team procedures, and event category rules and supplementary regulations2.4 Access to pit lane or service area and walkways by non-team members is monitored according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Jacks and other lifting devices, including lifting lock-outs, are fitted prior to underbody servicing2.2 Fire hazard and prevention procedures are followed according to team procedures or event category rules and supplementary regulations2.3 Pit lane and service area signals are used according to team procedures, and event category rules and supplementary regulations2.4 Access to pit lane or service area and walkways by non-team members is monitored according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Follow pit lane and service area safety procedures

elements.title: Carry out pit stop repairs and adjustments on competition vehicle

pcs.text: Pit stop is initiated and competition vehicle components are checked according to team pit stop or service area schedule3.2 Minor adjustments, emergency repairs, and component replacements are performed according to team instructions and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Work practices and pit stop or service area procedures are modified to manage contingency issues3.4 Problems are reported to team members according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pit stop is initiated and competition vehicle components are checked according to team pit stop or service area schedule3.2 Minor adjustments, emergency repairs, and component replacements are performed according to team instructions and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Work practices and pit stop or service area procedures are modified to manage contingency issues3.4 Problems are reported to team members according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pit stop is initiated and competition vehicle components are checked according to team pit stop or service area schedule3.2 Minor adjustments, emergency repairs, and component replacements are performed according to team instructions and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Work practices and pit stop or service area procedures are modified to manage contingency issues3.4 Problems are reported to team members according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out pit stop repairs and adjustments on competition vehicle

elements.title: Conduct post-stop clean-up

pcs.text: Tools and equipment are prepared and positioned ready for next vehicle stop4.2 Surplus components and consumables are tagged and stored4.3 Spillages are cleaned and waste is disposed of according to environmental requirements4.4 Team and event documentation is completed according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tools and equipment are prepared and positioned ready for next vehicle stop4.2 Surplus components and consumables are tagged and stored4.3 Spillages are cleaned and waste is disposed of according to environmental requirements4.4 Team and event documentation is completed according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tools and equipment are prepared and positioned ready for next vehicle stop4.2 Surplus components and consumables are tagged and stored4.3 Spillages are cleaned and waste is disposed of according to environmental requirements4.4 Team and event documentation is completed according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Conduct post-stop clean-up

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.
